programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe
programme.desc: Ozzy Osbourne and his wife watch rare and supernatural activity caught on camera.Jack tries to convince his skeptical parents to believe in something that seems out of this world.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are brave Poles who put everything on one card, left the country and found happiness beyond its borders.They will share with viewers their own definition of happiness, talk about the beginnings of their careers, the obstacles they encountered, failures and victories, hard work and constant self-improvement.The heroes' stories will be enriched with the stories of their loved ones, friends and colleagues who supported and encouraged them in the most difficult moments.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki looks for delicacies from all over the world.It will be possible, among others,to Georgia, Mexico and Madeira.There you will try local delicacies, such as sheep testicles or pancakes with ants.

programme.title: Mountain Life 2
programme.desc: Families who decided to live in mountain retreats will be shown.The creators visit the characters in their dream homes.To do this, they travel the world, from Appalachia to Hawaii.

programme.title: Mountain Life 2
programme.desc: Families who decided to live in mountain retreats will be shown.The creators visit the characters in their dream homes.To do this, they travel the world, from Appalachia to Hawaii.

programme.title: Mountain Life 2
programme.desc: Families who decided to live in mountain retreats will be shown.The creators visit the characters in their dream homes.To do this, they travel the world, from Appalachia to Hawaii.

programme.title: Mountain Life 2
programme.desc: Families who decided to live in mountain retreats will be shown.The creators visit the characters in their dream homes.To do this, they travel the world, from Appalachia to Hawaii.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The animal world is exceptionally fascinating.The program will feature scientific answers to questions about the amazing abilities of some creatures.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The animal world is exceptionally fascinating.The program will feature scientific answers to questions about the amazing abilities of some creatures.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The animal world is exceptionally fascinating.The program will feature scientific answers to questions about the amazing abilities of some creatures.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The animal world is exceptionally fascinating.The program will feature scientific answers to questions about the amazing abilities of some creatures.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska continues to look at the agritourism farm.He will explain how to deal with an interior full of slopes.He will point out how the owners hid the mirror in the window.He will also explain why each room should have a piece of furniture that stands out from others.Viewers will also learn how a tree can be transformed into a comfortable seat.The spa area will surprise you with a sauna in the shape of a bathyscaphe with a wonderful view of the forest.The host will have the opportunity to make a film dream come true.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: In the first episode, the host meets the owners of houses on four wheels.Katarzyna Jaroszyńska visits families who decided to spend the summer in trailers and campers.A family from Łódź, Krzysztof and Anna, together with their six children, go on holiday to their trailer by the sea every year.Their summer house was decorated in the style of French Provence.In turn, Ewelina and Jędrzej from Radom and their two daughters lived in a camper with a charming boho style.Meanwhile, Marek and Ewelina have been traveling around the world together for over 8 years.They finally managed to buy their own van, thanks to which they can move around without any problems.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: Katarzyna Jaroszyńska visits unusual houses, located in charming natural surroundings.The host will watch, among others:Dutch houses, barges, trailers, and houses made of containers.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Shocking dishes
programme.desc: Each country has its own traditional dishes.Unusual dishes include:baked bats or bee larvae in honey.Jarosław Nowak gets to know the strangest cuisines in the world.

programme.title: Shocking dishes
programme.desc: This time, Jarosław Nowak's goal is Kazakhstan.It is a country of contrasts, where you can see wild, green steppes and, on the other hand, modern, rapidly developing cities.First, the host visits Almaty, where he tries to discover what Kazakhs consider the strangest delicacy.He sees a traditional slaughterhouse and the world's largest camel farm.His plate includes sheep's head, camel meat and horse meat, which the local population considers to be Kazakh doping.According to culinary tradition and ancient customs, no part of the dish can be wasted, and the preparation of the dish itself is a real celebration.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Medium Amy Allan and retired homicide detective Steve DiSchiavi team up to investigate unexplained paranormal phenomena in haunted locations across the United States.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Medium Amy Allan and retired homicide detective Steve DiSchiavi team up to investigate unexplained paranormal phenomena in haunted locations across the United States.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world This time Martyna goes to Florida, which is Americans' favorite place to spend their retirement.They move there to spend the autumn of their lives walking along the seaside and watching sunsets.However, for the heroines of this episode - Donna and her bandmates - this is definitely not enough.The Calendar Girls group consists of thirty women aged 52 to 82.The women were united by their passion for dance and physical activity.They meet for training several times a week and take part in almost 200 performances a year.With their colorful and joyful repertoire, they entertain residents of retirement homes and financially support the training of guide dogs.The heroines of the episode prove that old age is joy.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Island Life 7
programme.desc: The program presents the stories of people who wanted to live on an island, in a picturesque area, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. There are those who want a tropical climate and those who would like to live on islands in the Washington area and have a view of the mountains.Real estate agents will present properties in various price ranges to program participants.From those at an extremely affordable price to the most expensive and luxurious ones.Viewers will find out what the enthusiasts of island life will choose and whether their dreams will finally become a reality.

programme.title: Island Life 7
programme.desc: The program presents the stories of people who wanted to live on an island, in a picturesque area, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. There are those who want a tropical climate and those who would like to live on islands in the Washington area and have a view of the mountains.Real estate agents will present properties in various price ranges to program participants.From those at an extremely affordable price to the most expensive and luxurious ones.Viewers will find out what the enthusiasts of island life will choose and whether their dreams will finally become a reality.

programme.title: Island Life 7
programme.desc: The program presents the stories of people who wanted to live on an island, in a picturesque area, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. There are those who want a tropical climate and those who would like to live on islands in the Washington area and have a view of the mountains.Real estate agents will present properties in various price ranges to program participants.From those at an extremely affordable price to the most expensive and luxurious ones.Viewers will find out what the enthusiasts of island life will choose and whether their dreams will finally become a reality.

programme.title: Island Life 7
programme.desc: The program presents the stories of people who wanted to live on an island, in a picturesque area, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. There are those who want a tropical climate and those who would like to live on islands in the Washington area and have a view of the mountains.Real estate agents will present properties in various price ranges to program participants.From those at an extremely affordable price to the most expensive and luxurious ones.Viewers will find out what the enthusiasts of island life will choose and whether their dreams will finally become a reality.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki likes to explore the world through his sense of taste.He loves to prepare various dishes at street stalls, in African villages or on the beach. However, during his culinary journeys it was not always easy for him.Sometimes elephants stole his ingredients.Of course, Pascal couldn't deny himself the pleasure of tasting local delicacies.In Delhi, he stopped for a long time at a paratha stand, in a Zanzibar village he ate rice with coconut, and in Namibia he tried a zebra steak."Taste the world with Pascal" is not only about cooking.The host visited an elephant orphanage in Sri Lanka, fed cheetahs in Africa and climbed a coconut tree.In Bombay he became a teacher and taught Polish to children, and on the coast of Zanzibar he hunted octopus.Everywhere his passion and positive energy attracted crowds of onlookers The first stop on Pascal's culinary journey is Sri Lanka.The cook visits the Pinawela center - an elephant orphanage.These huge mammals can eat up to 300 kg of food a day and they love carrots.Pascal will prepare a meal for these unusual gourmets.After a busy day, the chef decides to thank his newfound friends and invites them to dinner on the shores of the Indian Ocean.He chooses a quick recipe for chicken curry with the addition of cashew nuts, which are very popular on the island.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki likes to explore the world through his sense of taste.He loves to prepare various dishes at street stalls, in African villages or on the beach. However, during his culinary journeys it was not always easy for him.Sometimes elephants stole his ingredients.Of course, Pascal couldn't deny himself the pleasure of tasting local delicacies.In Delhi, he stopped for a long time at a paratha stand, in a Zanzibar village he ate rice with coconut, and in Namibia he tried a zebra steak."Taste the world with Pascal" is not only about cooking.The host visited an elephant orphanage in Sri Lanka, fed cheetahs in Africa and climbed a coconut tree.In Bombay he became a teacher and taught Polish to children, and on the coast of Zanzibar he hunted octopus.Everywhere his passion and positive energy attracted crowds of onlookers Pascal continues to explore the flavors of Sri Lanka - a country that is a leader in tea production.The cook decides to learn the secrets of working on the plantation.The appearance of an almost two-meter tall man will cause quite a sensation among the women working there.Pascal will also visit Negombo.The city on the west coast of the island is known mainly for its old market where you can buy various types of fish - from mackerel, through shark, to "flying fish".All fresh, straight from the sea.While exploring the coast, Pascal meets local fishermen.He offers them help, hoping that he will learn the secrets of preparing fish.However, it quickly turns out that he will have to prove himself as a trade fair seller.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki likes to explore the world through his sense of taste.He loves to prepare various dishes at street stalls, in African villages or on the beach. However, during his culinary journeys it was not always easy for him.Sometimes elephants stole his ingredients.Of course, Pascal couldn't deny himself the pleasure of tasting local delicacies.In Delhi, he stopped for a long time at a paratha stand, in a Zanzibar village he ate rice with coconut, and in Namibia he tried a zebra steak."Taste the world with Pascal" is not only about cooking.The host visited an elephant orphanage in Sri Lanka, fed cheetahs in Africa and climbed a coconut tree.In Bombay he became a teacher and taught Polish to children, and on the coast of Zanzibar he hunted octopus.Everywhere his passion and positive energy attracted crowds of onlookers This time Pascal went to Namibia, famous for its cow breeding and delicious beef.The chef grills his favorite steaks here and, as usual, he will do it in an unusual place.This time on the farm where they are kept.tame cheetahs.After meeting the big cats, Pascal sets off north of the country, to Opuwo, where he goes to a supermarket.Here he meets half-naked women from the Himba tribe who are shopping.He also visits the market where he buys a gift for the Herrero tribe - a goat.His gesture wins great acclaim and Pascal is welcomed into the village with an amazing dance.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki likes to explore the world through his sense of taste.He loves to prepare various dishes at street stalls, in African villages or on the beach. However, during his culinary journeys it was not always easy for him.Sometimes elephants stole his ingredients.Of course, Pascal couldn't deny himself the pleasure of tasting local delicacies.In Delhi, he stopped for a long time at a paratha stand, in a Zanzibar village he ate rice with coconut, and in Namibia he tried a zebra steak."Taste the world with Pascal" is not only about cooking.The host visited an elephant orphanage in Sri Lanka, fed cheetahs in Africa and climbed a coconut tree.In Bombay he became a teacher and taught Polish to children, and on the coast of Zanzibar he hunted octopus.Everywhere his passion and positive energy attracted crowds of onlookers The next stop on the "Taste the World with Pascal" map is India.Pascal will visit Delhi, where he will taste parathas, traditional wheat pancakes, served with green peas, carrots, bananas or cheese at street stalls.At one of the stalls, Pascal will serve passers-by chicken "Indian style" according to his own recipe.The leader will also visit temples where volunteers prepare free meals for pilgrims.In such kitchens, people cook for up to a thousand people.The cook had never cooked on such a scale.Later, Pascal will go to Bombay, where he will look for the perfect fish for his recipe at the fish market.And then he will prepare it in curry sauce, with peppers and coconut milk.A saleswoman at the local market lends him the kitchen.

programme.title: Indonesia's Best Ever Eats
programme.desc: A culinary journey to the largest island country in the world.Gourmets will discover the best dishes from five regions of Indonesia, including the area around Lake Toba in Sumatra.

programme.title: China according to Jarek Nowak
programme.desc: Jarek Nowak, anthropologist and traveler, goes on an expedition through China to rediscover one of the oldest civilizations in the world.The host will take viewers on a walk through the alleys of the Great Wall of China, tasting street food dishes and trekking through the Leaping Dragon Gorge.There will also be interesting attractions, surprising customs and unusual dishes.The traveler will advise you on how to get around, what to do in your free time and how to experience a once-in-a-lifetime adventure.The program is an alternative guide that contains a lot of interesting facts and practical tips for everyone.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: World weddings
programme.desc: Wedding customs can vary greatly from country to country.In Sweden, it is unacceptable for any woman to wear a red dress.However, in China there is another interesting custom - a few days before the wedding, the bride must cry in the presence of other women from the family.Anna Szlęzak will go to a Peruvian village in the Andes to observe the local wedding traditions.Local couples live together on a trial basis before officially getting married.This period may last even several years.If the relationship turns out to be unsuccessful, they break up unless they have children.Otherwise, they are obliged to get married.The entire community, without exception, is involved in organizing the celebration.The host will not only learn about the superstitions and customs prevailing here, but will also keep the bride company just before the wedding.She will then attend an Indian wedding reception.

programme.title: World weddings
programme.desc: Wedding customs can vary greatly from country to country.In Sweden, it is unacceptable for any woman to wear a red dress.However, in China there is another interesting custom - a few days before the wedding, the bride must cry in the presence of other women from the family.Anna Szlęzak will go to a Peruvian village in the Andes to observe the local wedding traditions.Local couples live together on a trial basis before officially getting married.This period may last even several years.If the relationship turns out to be unsuccessful, they break up unless they have children.Otherwise, they are obliged to get married.The entire community, without exception, is involved in organizing the celebration.The host will not only learn about the superstitions and customs prevailing here, but will also keep the bride company just before the wedding.She will then attend an Indian wedding reception.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.
